description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Others CI check that runs on push, pull request, and release events, ignoring certain paths. The workflow has two jobs, build and build_centos, that run on different operating systems and environments. The build job checks out the code, sets up a Rust toolchain, prepares vcpkg, and builds and tests the project using cmake and ctest. The build_centos job runs on a CentOS container, prepares the environment, and builds and tests the project with different configurations.
